ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This plugin is primarily designed for Android. Some features may be limited or unavailable on iOS and desktop.
ast.target: 此插件主要为 Android 设计。部分功能在 iOS 和桌面端可能受限或不可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional, use a vault-relative path like attachments/camera, leave blank to store next to the note.
ast.target: 可选，使用相对于仓库的路径，如 attachments/camera，留空则存储在笔记旁边。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically create the photos folder if it does not exist.
ast.target: 如果照片文件夹不存在，则自动创建。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, photos will be saved in the same folder as the note, or inside a photos folder within that same directory.
ast.target: 启用后，照片将保存在与笔记相同的文件夹中，或保存在该目录内的照片文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adjust the quality of compressed images. Lower values result in smaller files but worse quality.
ast.target: 调整压缩图像的质量。较低的值会导致文件更小但质量更差。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a prompt to choose between taking a new photo or picking an existing one from the gallery. This option is only relevant for Android, which supports both features. Do nothing on iOS/desktop.
ast.target: 显示提示，让用户选择拍摄新照片还是从相册选择现有照片。此选项仅适用于支持这两种功能的 Android。在 iOS/桌面端不执行任何操作。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 如果文件夹缺失则创建

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please open a Markdown note to insert the photo.
ast.target: 请打开一个 Markdown 笔记以插入照片。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active note to insert the photo.
ast.target: 没有活动笔记可插入照片。
